Button.figmaComponent: AMFM Portal — node 3273:19658 ("Primary" button set, default size 46px) and sibling nodes; icon-leading primary buttons confirmed on node 1894:16263 ("Get Started" CTA, lg size 50px), node 3724:23184 ("Invite Marriage Champions" CTA, sm size 42px), and node 1903:19737 (HeartChart link modal "Add a campus" CTA, compact size 38px), all resolving icons to button-primary-icon; common Figma Buttons/Button icon slot is 20px with effective 6px icon/text spacing; HeartChart standalone neutral controls in node 1903:19737 map to variant=outline size=control using semantic neutral outline tokens plus shadow-xs (Figma exports shadow-xs-skeuomorphic, but the implementation avoids reusing the primary shadow-button-inset token because it overdraws the neutral edge in browser review); reversed dark/brand-surface links and CTAs map to variant=outlineReversed, with Footer CTA node 1909:25789 using size=sm (42px); the input-attached Copy segment maps to variant=utilitySegment size=controlSegment; chrome-free upload-logo text-button instances in nodes 1903:19737 / 3724:20579 map to variant=link size=inline; CourseCard video CTA node 2320:27278 and HeartChartSummary actions node 1670:36217 map to variant=outline size=compact (38px); ResourceListItem's 48px resource-table action maps to variant=outline size=iconLg
